english translation text: So gaya maqtal may akbar sindagi roti rahiAkbar is asleep in the battlefield after losing his lifeEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Haey Laila ki tarapti khamoshi roti rahi
@HujjatELC
english translation text: Laila is shivering and crying thinking about the state of her brother

urdu transliteration text:
Zakhm barchi say nahi hay, dared sughra say kahoahmaday mursal ki maqtal may shabhi roti rahi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Akbar’s pain is not from the arrow in his chest, tell Sughra he feels your pain more,
The body of the one who resembles the Prophet (pbuh) cries out in the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Aay ga mera to akbar mujhko lainai kai liyemuntazir rahown may sughra hay khari roti rahi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
My brother will come to get me,
Sughra is stood waiting and crying with this hope

urdu transliteration text:
Josh ko hai zabt kaysay kaar lia abbas naytaygho ki chaown mai zarbay haidery roti rahi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
How was Abbas (a.s.) able to control his anger,
the courage of Haider is crying in the face of all the oppression

urdu transliteration text:
Bayrida darbaar laaye sahibay tatheer kogaysuway Zainab pai adil bandage roti rahi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
They brought the women of the Ahlulbayt to the courtyard unveiled,
modesty is crying over the oppressed Zainab (a.s.)
